---
title: "Module Title: Method Note"
author: "Dan Olner"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
---

## Summary

Brief description of the method.

## Method

Detailed method description.

## Reproducible Example

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

# Load dependencies and data
```

```{r}
#| label: analysis

# Run the analysis
```

## Assumptions and Limitations

## References
